div.span:
2. Dashboard sends
follow-up message or
user initiates

4. Graph initializes state
with incident context
& MCP tools

5. Specialists gather
evidence in parallel
K8s, metrics,
logs, code, runbooks

6. Supervisor aggregates
findings & decides
continue or summarize

8. Timeline events
persisted to PostgreSQL
with pending status

9. Follow-up state
stored to Redis
for conversation resume

12. Operator reads
findings & decides
on remediation
